name: EnigmAgent
description: Encrypted local vault for AI agents. Secrets resolve at submit time via {{PLACEHOLDER}} — your LLM never sees real values. AES-256-GCM + Argon2id.
author: Francisco Angulo de Lafuente

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
